name: Tampican Beef (Carne Tampique=f1a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast and hollow out the chili anchos. Remove the seeds and soak them in warm water for about 10 minutes.
2. Blend the chili anchos, tomato, garlic, half onion, salt to taste until a smooth puree is formed.
3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Fry the meat strips until browned on all sides, then remove from the pan and set aside.
4. Add the blended mixture to the same pan and cook for 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened. Season with salt to taste.
5. Grill the steak until it reaches your desired level of doneness. Optionally, you can barbecue it over high heat.
6. Grate the queso asadero very quickly on each plate. Be careful not to burn it by adjusting the grating time if necessary.
7. Place a strip of grilled meat on each plate. Add a piece of grated cheese, a tortilla that has been dipped in the salsa and folded over, half a lime, guacamole, and slices of onion.
8. Serve with hot tortillas and beans.
